question: Based on the chart, what can be concluded about revenue when advertising spend reaches 200 thousands?

options.A: Revenue will definitely continue to increase and exceed 600 thousands.
options.B: Revenue will definitely decrease below 300 thousands.
options.C: Revenue will remain exactly the same as at 140 thousands of ad spend.
options.D: Cannot be determined due to data variability.

explanation: While the trend line suggests increasing revenue, the data shows significant variability and only goes up to 150 thousands. Extrapolating to 200 thousands involves uncertainty, and option A implies a level of certainty that cannot be guaranteed given the scatter in the data. The concealed uncertainty lies in the variability around the trend line and the act of extrapolation beyond the observed data range.
